# VIP客户ID列表（从上次结果中提取）
customer_ids = ["CUS-001", "CUS-003", "CUS-005", "CUS-007"]

# 导出VIP客户报告
url = "http://localhost:56239/crm/export"
data = {
    "title": "VIP Customer Report",
    "customer_ids": customer_ids,
    "summary": "VIP customer report export - 4 customers from CRM system"
}

try:
    response = requests.post(url, json=data)
    result = response.json()
    print("Status Code:", response.status_code)
    print("Response:", result)
except Exception as e:
    print("Error:", str(e))
